entry.title: Re: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content:
Hi Shishir_P,

Is the issue solved? I am also following the same process. Changed the date also. But still it is givving the same error. Can you please hep me on that?

entry.title: Re: Using on-premise systems in your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant
entry.content: @DYang, only the "default" plan for SAP Cloud Identity Services is available for BTP trial. The "connectivity" plan is not.

entry.title: Re: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content: Hi, we complete the requirement using the event BPNEX. In transaction BUPA_EVENTS you can find the events BPNUM (for internal numbering) and BPNEX (for external numbering), these are made to influence in the number being saved, but we use it to validate and trigger messages. It works partially, because the event is trigger when you change the grouping, not the BP number, but the client accepted the restrictions.

entry.title: error DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)
entry.content:
Buenas tardes, al crear un documento basado en un borrador, devuelve el siguiente error: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)

el envio es el siguiente: "Document": {
"DocEntry": "305509"
}

Usamos SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.170) FP 2108 (64-bit)

Muchas gracias

entry.title: Storing payload data in Application Message Type: SAP_MessageType
entry.content:
Dear All,

In the Content Modifier, we have the option to store a payload field's value in the SAP_MessageType property, which can be viewed in CPI monitoring as shown below. However, will this impact monitoring storage capacity? Would it be better to avoid using this property and instead use a custom property with SAP_MessageProcessingLogCustomStatus for logging?

Please advise on the best practice.

entry.title: TROUBLE WITH ATP IN SALES ORDER (SAP B1/HANA)
entry.content:
Dear all

I'm facing a trouble with ATP calculation in a sales order.

I'm creating a sales order for quantity 10 on item A. This item have only 5 in stock. So, the Message coming from the delivery schedule details display that only 5 pieces can be taken (ok at this step)

The delivery schedule management show that 5 are committed and 5 are unconfirmed (still ok).

But, in the column of the sales order, the committed value is 10 and not 5. The procurement wizard start automatically (option on logistics tab) but the choice "include only unconfirmed quantities" is not displaying a purchase for 5. It brings 0.

I tried several changes on ATP rule and items but it's always the same trouble.

I don't find where I did a mistake on settings ?

Thanks for your help

Pascal

(Tests are done on SAP B1 10.00.240 SP2402)

entry.title: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after deployment to cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have created a Node.js CAP application(List report & Object page) using managed approuter and deployed it to cloud foundry. I have not added any kind of authentication in it, Package.json doesn't have an auth stanza in the requires section and this is what my xs-security file looks like :

When I go into my dev space and start the 'app-srv', it takes me to the index page where all the services are. But when i click on any service it gives 401 unauthorized . The interesting thing is when i access the app from the HTML5 Applications tab i can view the List report page and it shows me all the data.

I am also having the same issue with an app that i created with standalone approuter, As those applications dont appear in the HTML5 repository the only way to access them is through the link in your dev space. And that gives the authorization error.

Any ideas why this is happening ?

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Issues with adding object as CustomData value
entry.content:
new sap.m.Input({
    customData: [
        new sap.ui.core.CustomData({ key: "myCustomData", value: "{ path: 'myValue' }" }),
    ],
});

how about this?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI issue HTTP operation failed invoking https://...
entry.content:
I had the same issue. What I did was format the GraphQL as a JSON. Meaning for example if you have the following query: 

mutation Purchase_order_create {
    purchase_order_create(
        data: {
            po_date: "2024-09-05"
            subtotal: "0"
            shipping_price: "0"
            total_price: "0"
            po_number: "1234"
            warehouse_id: "azerty"
            line_items: [
                {
                    sku: "en-test-01"
                    expected_weight_in_lbs: "0"
                    quantity: 10
                    fulfillment_status: "Pending"
                    price: "0"
                }
            ]
        }
    ) {
        request_id
        complexity
    }
}

send it as: 

{
"query": "mutation Purchase_order_create { purchase_order_create( data: { po_date: \"2024-09-05\" subtotal: \"0\" shipping_price: \"0\" total_price: \"0\" po_number: \"1234\" warehouse_id: \"azerty\" line_items: [ { sku: \"en-test-01\" expected_weight_in_lbs: \"0\" quantity: 10 fulfillment_status: \"Pending\" price: \"0\" } ] } ) { request_id complexity } }"
}

Hope this helps. This way you can also leave the content-type 'application/json' as specified in the documentation. 

Here is the Groovy script I created that works for my queries. Your results may vary if you have more complicated queries. 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.json.JsonOutput

def processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body of the incoming message (which contains the GraphQL query)
    def graphqlQuery = message.getBody(String)
   
    // Convert the GraphQL query to the JSON format
    def jsonResult = convertGraphQLToJSON(graphqlQuery)
   
    // Convert the JSON object to a string
    def jsonString = JsonOutput.toJson(jsonResult)
   
    // Set the formatted JSON as the new message body
    message.setBody(jsonString)
   
    return message
}

def convertGraphQLToJSON(String graphqlQuery) {
    def jsonQuery = graphqlQuery.replaceAll('"', '\\"').replaceAll('\n', ' ')
    return [query: jsonQuery]
}

entry.title: Re: Transition to SAP Cloud ALM – We’ve Got the Solution
entry.content:
Thank you @PTownsend for the very useful blog.

The following 2 links have helped me answer most questions I had:

Transition to SAP Cloud ALM for Operations 
Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) Questions & Answers 

It's clear that Java systems and non Hana databases are not supported. This makes sense in the context of those being out of support at the end of 2027.

What is the plan with Content Server on MaxDB? Currently it is possible to monitor Content Server in Solution Manger 7.2

Are you aware of a procedure guide for 'cleaning up' systems moved to CALM from Solution Manager? Do we clean these up from the SLD and LMDB too? Will CALM send the information to Maintenance  Planner? We'll still have a support stack upgrade to do before we get to S4/Hana

Thanks so much

Gavin

entry.title: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to 9.5.0 and sap cx to 2211.27
entry.content:
Hi,

I recently upgraded my Local Sap Commerce Cloud version from 2211.21 to 2211.27 and consequently had to upgrade my local solr configuration to 9.5.0 following this kba https://me.sap.com/notes/0003424311 and upgraded the configurations in this page and this page.  Now indexes and facets seems work correctly but i still cannot access to https://localhost:8983/solr/#/login anymore, as Chrome returns me ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED error (I also tried with other browsers) without opening the page. It seems like my local instance is not running but when I try to curl my login form  curl http://localhost:8983/solr/ I get an html page stating this:

SolrCore Initialization Failures
  • core: error
Please check your logs for more information
Permission failure
Your user does not have the necessary role(s) to perform this action.
This is my output for
ps aux | grep solr
user 3063323 4.1 8.7 5496772 703256 pts/6 Sl 16:01 0:35 /home/user/.sdkman/candidates/java/current/bin/java -server -Xms512m -Xmx512m -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=250 -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -Xlog:gc*:file=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/log/solr/instances/default/solr_gc.log:time,uptime:filecount=9,filesize=20M -Dsolr.jetty.inetaccess.includes= -Dsolr.jetty.inetaccess.excludes= -Dsolr.log.dir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/log/solr/instances/default -Djetty.port=8983 -DSTOP.PORT=7983 -DSTOP.KEY=solrrocks -Dhost=localhost -Duser.timezone=UTC -XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow -XX:+CrashOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:ErrorFile=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/log/solr/instances/default/jvm_crash_%p.log -Djetty.home=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server/server -Dsolr.solr.home=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/config/solr/instances/default -Dsolr.install.dir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server -Dsolr.install.symDir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server -Dsolr.default.confdir=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/bin/modules/search-and-navigation/solrserver/resources/solr/9.5/server/server/solr/configsets/_default/conf -Djava.util.logging.manager=org.apache.logging.log4j.jul.LogManager -Dlog4j.configurationFile=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/config/solr/instances/default/log4j2.xml -Xss256k -Dsolr.data.home=/home/user/project-sap-commerce/core-customize/hybris/data/solr/instances/default -Dsolr.httpclient.builder.factory=org.apache.solr.client.solrj.impl.PreemptiveBasicAuthClientBuilderFactory -Dbasicauth=solradmin:admin123 -XX:CompileCommand=exclude,com.github.benmanes.caffeine.cache.BoundedLocalCache::put -DdisableAdminUI=false -DzkACLProvider=org.apache.solr.common.cloud.DefaultZkACLProvider -DzkCredentialsProvider=org.apache.solr.common.cloud.DefaultZkCredentialsProvider -DzkCredentialsInjector=org.apache.solr.common.cloud.DefaultZkCredentialsInjector -Dsolr.log.muteconsole -jar start.jar --module=http --module=gzip
user 3081580 0.0 0.0 4028 2124 pts/6 S+ 16:15 0:00 grep --color=auto solr
 
Maybe i mismatched the exact installation directory or something about security.json? Do you know what is the problem? Please note that I'm using windows 11 with WSL.
Thank you for your time.

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case

RG

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Issues with adding object as CustomData value
entry.content: It doesn't make a difference, still somehow converted to an object and null. You can easily try it in the https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/ console.

entry.title: Add custom field to Inbound Delivery - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all!

I am trying to add a custom field to inbound deliveries. However, I cannot find the right 'business context' in the custom field app.

I tried the other way around - Adapt UI. I was expecting to see the 'Add field' option using which I can jump into custom field app with the business context automatically populated:

 

Unfortunately in the inbound delivery creation screen, I don't see that option (maybe because this is a GUI screen?):

The settings here are pretty different.

Am I doing something wrong? Is it possible at all to add a custom field to the GUI screen for inbound delivery? 

Thanks

Snigdhodeep

Laurent

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case
entry.content:
Hi @steffenriemann ,

Thank you so much for replying to my query.

I was able to solve it by making a dummy change as you suggested. I used ‘Edit Line Items’ button on 'Manage Customer line Items' App and changed the dunning block then Saved. The custom field's value was updated. Then Mass update them back to their original dunning block value.

Regards,

RG

entry.title: Custom Alert for different periods
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am setting up Custom Alert in IBP WEB UI. The question is if it is possible to compare KFs in different periods, meaning compare if S&OP Country Demand Plan in October 2024 is 30% higher than Actuals Qty in October 2023. Please, let me know if there is a way.

Best regards

Mariia

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change time zone on Hana database 2...

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing with SUBMIT program
entry.content: You are asking yourself too many questions ;-). Just run a real case, see what the problems are, and fix them in a simple way. It's the same question as a SELECT performance issue, you can know only after running in a production-like system.

Al

entry.title: Re: Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid isn't working with only one selected record?
entry.content: Please explain exactly in which context you are using get_selected_rows, and the best is to provide a small reproducible example. In the classic scenario, the issue you describe doesn't exist.

entry.title: Planning your SAP TechEd sessions? Get insights from some SAP Champions!
entry.content:
Don’t miss out on this opportunity to learn, share, and build alongside fellow tech enthusiasts. This is where ideas get real, and the future is shaped—be part of it! Each year, approaching SAP TechEd, we ask our SAP Community leaders to browse the session catalog and share with us their expert session playlists. So if you are still not sure which sessions to attend and want to plan your time wisely, check out what our SAP Champions have planned, and why!

Kunal's playlist - learn more!
1. XP101 SAP BTP strategy and highlights
2. IN100 Innovate now with a modern, AI-assisted integration suite
3. IN103 Modernize and elevate to the cloud with SAP Integration Suite
4. DA180 Explore SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud end to end
5. IN102 Take control of your APIs with the API Management and Graph capabilities


Ruthvik's playlist - learn more!
1. KEY100 SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where ideas get real
2. DT100 Unlocking the intelligent enterprise: Cloud ERP innovations for the future
3. DT102 Tools and services to make your transition to SAP S/4HANA Cloud easier
4. DT180 Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP IBP using SAP Integration Suite


Maria Antonieta's playlist - learn more!
1. KEY100CEST SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where Ideas Get Real and experience firsthand how SAP is pushing the boundaries of innovation.
2. DEV101A Keynote Recap + Community Welcome
3. DT202 Understand How Composable Architecture Can Unleash Your Business Value
4. XP204 Modernize Your Technology Landscape with SAP BTP and SAP LeanIX Solutions
5. AI100 Artificial intelligence that creates real-world results


Sebastiano's playlist - learn more!
1. DEV100A Developer Keynote [Deconstructed]: Keeping the Promise
2. AD180 Build Extensions with ABAP Cloud and Joule's ABAP Developer Capabilities
3. AD100 Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Interoperability to Keep Your Core Clean
4. AD200 Extend Joule with SAP Build and Develop Custom Enterprise Skills
5. AD181 Develop Applications and Processes with SAP Build and Joule
6. DA181 Build AI-Enabled Intelligent Data Applications to Help Keep the Core Clean
7. DEV102CEST SAP Community Welcome


Punith's playlist - learn more!
1. IN180 Future-proof your SAP PI/PO investments with SAP Integration Suite
2. IN200 Unleash the power of AI in enterprise integrations
3. IN100 Innovate now with a modern, AI-assisted integration suite


Nil's playlist - learn more!
1. DEV102CEST SAP Community Welcome
2. DA107 SAP Datasphere: Recent innovations, road map, and strategy
3. DA110 How to treat data as a product
4. AI180 Build your own generative AI scenario for your use case
5. DA180 Explore SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud end to end


Murali's playlist - learn more!
1. AD107 Boost your coding efficiency: Explore Joule's ABAP developer capabilities
2. AD102 Unlock SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensibility with SAP Build
3. AD200 Extend Joule with SAP Build and develop custom enterprise skills
4. IN202 Gain flexibility and scalability with a hybrid integration platform


Dominik's playlist - learn more!
1. KEY100CEST SAP TechEd in 2024 Launch - Where ideas get real
2. AD100 Unlock SAP Build and ABAP Cloud interoperability to elevate your extensions
3. AI180 Build your own generative AI scenario for your use case
4. AI102 Enhance business predictions with SAP Foundation Model and knowledge graphs
5. AI104 Revolutionize ABAP development with Joule, our generative AI copilot

View all expert playlists today! Come and meet our SAP Champions and SAP Mentors - see their topics of expertise, and expand your network.

@KunalBansal | @Ruthvik_Chowdary | @MariettaLopez | @smarchesini | @Punith_Oswal | @NilPeksen | @Murali_Shanmugham | @DominikTylczyn | @TammyPowlas | @DanielleLarocca | @Karen | @MortenWittrock | @StephanieMarley

entry.title: Re: Transition to SAP Cloud ALM – We’ve Got the Solution
entry.content:
Hello @Gavin_G,

Thanks a lot for your comments and questions. I'll pass your questions on to a true expert who can hopefully answer them as soon as possible.

All the best,

Paul

entry.title: Re: Close another abap program, in manner similiart to LEAVE PROGRAM
entry.content:
Apologies, we have a BADI that can be described as:

If result contain result A start transaction B for screen

                - Show result screen

                onClick SAPEVENT:RESULT?action=continue/workflow/cancel

                SAPEVENT:RESULT message action to hook and exits
what we want to change:

If result contain result A start transaction B for screen

                -Show result screen

                onClick have service contact abap to: continue/override/cancel 

                SERVICE close transaction started by main thread <- hense my question if we can have another abap program close another.

I'd like to an abap program listen to input to close the abap program getting the result, does that make sense? or is it still too vague, or is just not something that should be done?

entry.title: Re: Create or modify the background element for Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hello @xavierlegarrec and Team,
Greetings of the day !

We need to use "startdate" and "endate" fields from background element in our basis custom formulae in set bonus calculation

Currently "START/END" fields are only reserved for startdate and endate and system allows only numeric fields in custom basis formulae 

Can we change the reserved field name or do we have any other solution for the same?

Kindly Suggest.

Best Regards,

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Savings with Bing X Referral Code 'WXDRQL'
entry.content: in today's globalized world

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba - Spend Management Supplier registration status
entry.content: Just checking in so somebody will answer this

entry.title: Re: Email notification for integration error in SAP Business Network for Logistics
entry.content:
Dear Ravish,

I see that this app is valid for LBN freight collaboration. 

Is there a similar functionality for LBN Global Track and Trace to receive an email when integration issues occur with service providers communication ?

Kind regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Supplier Invoice S4 HANA Public cloud - CDS view for GST Tax amount & Withholding Tax Amount
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are working on developing a supplier invoice item level report and there was a requirement to add the GST tax amount and Withholding tax amount fields each line item wise.The report has been created using the following standard data sources 

  1. I_JournalEntry
  2. I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01
  3. I_SupplierInvoiceTaxAPI01
  4. I_ParkedOplAcctgDocPyblsItem
  5. I_Withholdingtaxitem
  6. I_User

We tried fetching the tax amount field from the above cds and was able to get correct tax values for each line item in the supplier invoice item level report when we use the different gst tax codes for different supplier line items. But, we are getting cumulative tax values for each line item if we use same tax code for different line items due this the tax amount showing as overstated.

Is there any standard cds view that could give us the GST tax amount values at line item wise and also the WHT tax amount for supplier invoice at line item wise?

entry.title: Re: Inconsistencies after Post Goods Issues.
entry.content: Was looking for an answer for BSX & OSI Postings. OSS Note 2977680 - Single-line FI document for non-valuated goods movement answers this question

entry.title: Re: Inconsistencies after Post Goods Issues.
entry.content: also 3417839 - Transaction Key OSI

entry.title: Re: Can't create destination service for a UI5 app for Build Work Zone
entry.content: In Step 4 Create a new destination I can see that the destination is created manually. So it seems that the Instance destination in your mta.yaml was added by one of the yeoman generator steps. Have you tracked the steps with git commits? So you could find out. I would suggest that you remove everything starting at config. Maybe @nicoschoenteich can have a look here and do adjustments to the tutorial.

entry.title: Re: Tools for DCL finding according to CDS entity
entry.content:
Hello,
I am currently looking for recommendations when to definitely use DCLs. I found this link here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/when-to-add-access-control-for-cds-views-dcl/qaq-p/12736303
But the answer here is very high level. Are there specific annotations/annotation values that can be checked to decide whether a CDS view requires DCL protection or not? E.g. @VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION was mentioned before... (Another candidate could be @odata.publish:true) Is there an official SAP recommendation regarding consumption views and DCLs? I understand the need for DCL here to a certain point. But what about BASIC and COMPOSITE views? I would expect that these require DCLs, too just to prevent them from being accessed directly. As far as I understand, access should always happen on the consumption views.

entry.title: Re: Planning your SAP TechEd sessions? Get insights from some SAP Champions!
entry.content: #sapchampions (and #sapmentors) give the best advice and help! Thank you for all that you do!

entry.title: Free goods in purch Info record MM SAP S/4
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

I want to define a rule for free goods in purchasing Info record, 

1- Creation of Info record : condition NR00

 

2- I did a test in ME21N and even Good receipt but I dont get my free goods 

3- GR  (80 000 because I have a conversion rules (1 NV  purch unit= 20 EA stock unit )

 

Could you please advise me

entry.title: Unable to delete Purchasing groups
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I was trying to delete standard SAP purchasing groups getting the below error.

Deletion not possible for record created by SAP".

Environment

So please help to delete the  purchasing groups.

Thanks 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to delete Purchasing groups
entry.content:
Hello,

The records created by customers can be deleted but deletion of records provided by SAP is not possible.

Thanks 

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: Re: Mostrar pages o páginas en S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Era para notificar que, hay que elegir los intereses primero, sino no te muestran las páginas (Pages) en el Dashboard, por si alguno tenía ese problema que lo supiera cómo solucionarlo.  Gracias.

entry.title: Re: Deleting obsolete customer outputs
entry.content:
I am still looking for this in 2024. Switching from old message control via customer master to the more recent determination via condition system.
I have a lot of old customer masters with KNVD entries, that are not longer valid (messagee "table T683S is missing entry for B DB DB0001 XX") where XX = message type.

Any solution to this?

entry.title: Re: Close another abap program, in manner similiart to LEAVE PROGRAM
entry.content: At least, the precise words BAdI and SAPEVENT make me understand what you have in your code (CL_GUI_HTML_VIEWER), "service" and the rest are really vague. I don't see what really happens like a SUBMIT or a CALL SCREEN somewhere. Let's see if someone else understands. Are you sure your question is ABAP Cloud and ABAP Extensibility?

entry.title: Agentry CT drop down doesn't populate record if there is only one matching record with cascade index
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have an Agentry transaction screen where the Complex table drop-down field does not show the right record if there is only one matching record as per cascade parent index. 

Details :-

  • There is an UI element(Template Equipment) of type Complex table drop-down in a transaction screen.
  • The selection method in the UI element is "Always Open Dialog with Search".
  • Data filtered/shown matching with two level index (By class and by Category) - Class is another drop-down in the same screen and category is always "A". 
  • The functionality is - when class is selected in the first drop-down then only matching(by class and by category) template equipment will be populated/shown in the second drop-down (Template Equipment).
  • It works fine except one scenario as mentioned below. 
  • Agentry Client :- WPF (72.x)

Failure scenario :- When there is only one matching template equipment as per selected class then it does not show the right equipment, it shows the previously selected equipment.

Observation :- 

  • This works fine with Agentry client 71.x but does not work in version 72.x and 73.x.  
  • It also works fine in client version 72.x and 73.x when we change the selection method to "Drop-Down menu".
  • It only fails if the matching record count is 1, if it is more than then it works perfectly alright.

Is this a known issue with Agentry client version 72.x and 73.x ?  

Your response would be much appreciated.

Thanks,

Sudhir.

entry.title: Automation Launcher in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I’m trying to configure Automation Launcher to execute an automation manually but I’m receiving the error shown in the screenshot below. Please advise.

Also, is there any other way to execute automation manually by various users?

entry.title: Re: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after de...
entry.content:
You need to adjust your xs-security.json to include the scope uaa.user. Check this references:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/accessing-business-service-data?locale=en-US&q=%22uaa.user%22

https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/concepts/architecture/uaa.html#uaa-scopes

It's needed as you use the managed approuter and it does a token exchange from the Launchpad Authentication to your Applications XSUAA Instance.

entry.title: Re: Close another abap program, in manner similiart to LEAVE PROGRAM
entry.content:
Well the thing is that I dont have any code yet, I'm just trying to figure out what exactly is possible,as in can I close a transaction with an external program.

The only thing I have found so far to close anything is the function module TH_CLOSE_MODE, but it closes the entire session/mode, which is not what I am interested in.

Well I'd imagine it would abap code, but please let me know if I shouldnt put it elsewhere, I am not entirely sure where else to put it.

entry.title: Re: Where used functionality for ABAP CDS views?
entry.content: Is there a cloud equivalent of this transaction? This solution won't work when transactions are no longer available.

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: @joshpassman The issue I reported on May 10th, 2024 is no longer an issue, so I never submitted an SAP ticket.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
Hi @SivaRamaKrishnaP 

That ticket has long been closed with the SAP response that it didn't represent a bug or broken service. But I can create a new one. Just to clarify, what exactly should I ask for:  a way to override the original manifest.json in an adaptation project? or how to remove cards from an Overview page?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Hear from SAP Champion Amin Omidy How Lifelong Learning Can Unlock Your Career Potential
entry.content: Thank you for sharing @Amin_Omidy !!

entry.title: Re: Hear from SAP Champion Kunal Bansal 🏅: How SAP TechEd Virtual 2024 Can Help Boost Your Career
entry.content: Great read @KunalBansal - thank you!!

entry.title: Re: CAP Handler for all entities at once
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

you can achieve the requested functionality by using *. So adjust your before event registration to:

this.before(['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'], '*', async (req)

entry.title: Tolerance group has no user assignment for company code
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have the following problem:

We have the "Phys.inv.tolerance group" 0001, here we wanted to change the column: “Difference amount per phys. Inv. position”, which is unfortunately not possible. So we have created a new group: Z001
Unfortunately, this group cannot be saved without entering a user in the user assignment to create the group.
To try it out, I assigned a user, but now I can't get it out.
A user assignment is not desired.

I have read that a user assignment is not necessary and no user was assigned in the previous group until now.

Best regards,

Marco

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content: Maybe @steffenschad can provide some input regarding the status of the influencing request https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/255932 ?

entry.title: Re: Propagating Original Start Date to Rehire with new employment.
entry.content: thanks for this article. we have different scenario that if employee has been terminated over 1 year and rehired, then the original start date should be the same date with rehired date, otherwise the original start date should be the previous start date as same with the article. could you suggest how to set up this rehire case after over 1 year termination?  thanks.

entry.title: BOBJ WEBI is not showing Unit of Measure along with Key figure
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working with BOBJ 4.2 SP9 - WEBI Where backend is a HANA CV and using Relational Connection. I couldn't see the Key Figure Value with UOM in WEBI even after the binding was done in HANA View.

I am able to see the same Key Figure in HANA and AFO with Unit of Measure attached.

Please help if you have come across this issue.

 

Thanks,

Sriram

entry.title: Re: Extending legacy Fiori apps in BAS
entry.content: Awesome blog. Thanks. 😎

entry.title: employee working in PA, but residing in NJ.
entry.content: We have a new employee working in PA, but residing in NJ. NJ and PA share a reciprocal agreement. How do we turn on reciprocity in SAP?

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Issues with adding object as CustomData value
entry.content: this worked.

entry.title: Re: Create an offline mobile app using successfactors oda...
entry.content:
Hey Jitendra,

I've created a destination inside mobile connectivity to successfactors, after that I could test the connection in the same screen and I could see the data and metadata.

Here is the metadata retrived by the destination I've created.

 

Here is an example of retrieving data from an SF entity called FOLocation

 

After that, I've created the MDK App using this service, there I can see the Entities and I've selected FOLocation. Then I created an object table to show all the data, then I deployed and open the mobile services app.

Nothing appears, even errors.

 

I think I know what's happened, I'm trying to use it as offline, but I didn't create an MBT Service as this tutorial ask to be done before run the app.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-mobile-backend-tools-simple-odata.html

I think I've done everything correctly, but once I haven't done the MBT sync with SuccessFactors, the offline store is empty, I think I need to fill it first and then I'll be able to see the data. The way I'm using seems to be an online app using an OData api, but this is not what I need.

I think, lol.

Thank you for your reply, I appreciate any comments or suggestions.

entry.title: External Authentication for Microsoft Office 365 in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
All prerequisites for Microsoft Azure settings have been configured.

External Authentication registration of Microsoft Office365 still returns blank screen.

entry.title: Tools for legal + management consolidation (including distribution)?
entry.content:
Hi community, looking for a tool that can perform both financial/legal consolidation and management consolidation (FICO already in use)

Thinking of going with SAP Group Reporting for legal consolidation. For management consolidation, there is top-down distribution by customer AFTER consolidation and creation of P&L by customer. Wanted to understand the flow of data between S/4 Hana Finance, GR and COPA:

1. S/4 Hana Finance (transaction data) to GR (eliminations, etc.) to COPA - Margin Analysis (top-down distribution and reporting)

2. OR S/4 Hana Finance (transaction data) to COPA - Margin Analysis (top-down distribution of aggregated data) to GR (eliminations, etc. and reporting)

3. Alternatively, can management consolidation be performed by apps outside GR, pulled into COPA (Margin Analysis) and then sent to GR for reporting?

4. Does COPA have P&L report templates for management reporting?

5. Any other considerations for the above combination of tools?

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Release Universal Journal not available for some periods
entry.content: Hello everyone, does it happen to have some feedback about this issue, and what did SAP suggested? Thank you

entry.title: Re: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after de...
entry.content:
I tried making changes to my xs-security file in the app that i created using the standalone router:

Redeployed it, And gave the role 'appTokenExchange' to my user in BTP. But it is still giving me the same error.

@gregorw

entry.title: Re: Does standard print program RFKORD10 support PDF based forms
entry.content: Thanks in advance.RFKORD10_PDF Program generating Custom form now my requirement to archive the Form how to do that after spool print? .

entry.title: ABAP runtime error - EC01
entry.content:
Hi All,

Am copying one company code From to To through EC01. While copying getting the below dump.

DDIC_TYPELENG_INCONSISTENT

Short Text
Inconsistency in the length of DDIC data type "KNA1".

Gone through some notes and checked the status of the "DFKKOP" structure is active and consistencies only.

 

Can anybody help me out this to resolve.

 

Thanks 

Nithish

entry.title: Re: SAP Central Finance – !!! Plan your CUTOVER !!!
entry.content: Do you have a template of Business/Commercial cutover ? where show the preparation and task that need to be validatate before with the business?

entry.title: Re: Net due date calculation with Working Days only
entry.content: Dear Customer, I see you raised same question in ticket 996354/2024. The case is currently under process by me, I will contact you shortly in the ticket itself. Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Hi , Task 3 Finished  .

entry.title: Request for API and cds views details for the application Display bom level by level (cs11) t.code
entry.content:
According to our requirement under FG we have several SFG and components assigned to each SFG  materials should be available as displayed in the application explode bom level by level ( TCODE : CS11)for forms customization.

We checked the API and CDS views related to it but couldn't find one .Hence kindly suggest us the related API and CDS views


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for API and cds views details for the applica...
entry.content:
The BOM API API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV;v=2 has a entity ExplodeBOM   ( https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002/overview )

The available CDS views for BOM's is available at the resource CDS Views for Bill of Material

entry.title: Re: The token in the OpenDocument URL does not work
entry.content:
I dont use tomcat. I have c# application and using sap rest apis. I fixed solution like below;

I was getting a token using the X-SAP-LogonToken value in the response header and encoding it, but there were double quotes at the beginning and end of the token coming from here, so I was having problems, but when I removed the double quotes at the beginning and end and did Url.Encode like that, the token was successful this time. it worked like this.

entry.title: Re: Create or modify the background element for Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hi @Ravi14 

Can you please explain more about what you would like to achieve ?

I have never heard such a request, I'm curious to understand the business requirement to see if I can think of another way to build this (reserved fields cannot be changed nor can if-then rules be built into the custom basis formula).

Thanks

entry.title: Temporary Time Information for China new hires
entry.content:
Hi

Is anyone else using Temporary Time Information for China to deal with weekends becoming working days.

We use this feature but our HR team would like to know if there is a way of automating this for new hires as currently they create the temporary time information for each new hire in China.

Keen to know how others are handling this process.

Thanks!

Chris

entry.title: SAP IS-OIL and SD Invoice process
entry.content:
Hello all, 

Can somebody help me understand how does the volumetric data flow from SAP IS-OIL to the invoices in SD. Where is the connection established and if possible explain the whole hydrocarbon management to SD flow on how the invoices are generated once the production and valuation is done. 

Thank you.

entry.title: plm++.ecf originial - How to avoid this creation (SAP PLM ECTR-CREO)
entry.content: With the latest SAP PLM ECTR for CREO (SP09) there is an option to activate "Creo View" neutral format. It was activated within SAP PLM ECTR Creo Settings configuration and the dtype xml was also modified to include Creo View. A workstation application (PVZ) was created to support .pvz ie. Creo view files. The Creo view neutral format does great created. However like retail stores offering, "buy one get one free", in addition to Creo view file plm++.ecf also gets created. Is there a way to prevent the creation of plm++.ecf?

entry.title: Knowledge Exchange B1 Production Module
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we have been using SAP B1 for over a decade now but we only started using the Production module very recently and despite very valuable help by our SAP consultants, we are not super happy with the B1 production processes as they seem quite cumbersome.

Before investing time and money into possibly unnecessary add-ons, I thought it might be extremely valuable to see the Production module in action at another company which has gained more experience with it. Of course, this would not have to be a one-sided exchange as we are more than happy to share our knowledge regarding all other B1 modules.

Not 100% sure if this is the right place to ask this but: Is there anyone out there who is content with his/her B1 production processes and would be willing to share his/her practical experience with us?

Thanks for all responses!

entry.title: Re: Fields for People DPI missing
entry.content: If the source system is same, you can use the same DPI. Else try to calculate it as custom KPI under People KPI. However, from performance perspective it is always better to push down the calculations in back end.

entry.title: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
TypeScript simply adds types to JavaScript. We can use it to reduce run-time errors in our CAP Node.js apps by catching bugs at design-time. After bringing you up to speed with the TypeScript basics we will look at the great new TypeScript features in CAP and show you how easy it is to make the switch.

Speaker: Mike Doyle

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden error in CAP app when accessing from BTP
entry.content:
Compare the URLs of the GET and POST requests by debugging in the browser during the call. The POST URL will be missing some parts that the GET URL contains. You can hardcode the missing part in your program for the POST call. This should resolve the issue.  

Debug and find the missing part of url:

ADD the missing part to your POST URL in code:

 

 

Calvin.

SAP Technical Lead.

entry.title: Re: Was SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL16 Build 7820 pulled for Windows X86/X64?
entry.content: Does SAP have an estimate on when the new Windows EBF will be posted with a properly signed installer?

entry.title: Re: More on Activate / Deactivate BEx Conditions
entry.content:
Hello Tammy,

Is it possible to activate/deactivate the conditions using Excel VBA?

In any case let me know, please.

BR

Alejandro

entry.title: Re: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Publ...
entry.content:
Hi @Edna

Thanks for your response and the suggestion to use API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV.

I'm specifically looking for a solution that works directly within the on-stack ABAP environment in S/4HANA Cloud Public. My understanding is that cl_attachment_service_api is designed for this purpose, allowing me to avoid any HTTP communication overhead. 

I also believe that direct ABAP communication with cl_attachment_service_api could help reduce the risk of failures, which is important for ensuring attachments are saved reliably.

Please correct me if I'm wrong on any of these points.

Thanks again for your help!

entry.title: Re: Automation Launcher in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Sipra,

Thank you for reaching out to us. It seems that you may have consumed the limited quota. To check and resolve this, please follow these steps in your BTP tenant:

  1. Navigate to your subaccount.
  2. Go to Entitlements.
  3. Search for Build Process Automation.
  4. Check the Quota Assignment details for Automation - Attended.

If the quota has already been consumed, please assign an additional quota for Automation Attended. This should resolve your issue. If you continue to face challenges, please share a screenshot, and we will investigate further.

entry.title: Re: CX_PARAMETER_INVALID_RANGE for CL_ABAP_TSTMP for the ABAP program /GRCPI/SAPLGRIA_SPM
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: How to activate BEx-conditions per VBA script / macro
entry.content:
Hello Peter,

Have you found a way to do it?

Thank you,

Alejandro

entry.title: Re: CX_PARAMETER_INVALID_RANGE for CL_ABAP_TSTMP for the ABAP program /GRCPI/SAPLGRIA_SPM
entry.content: Even i am getting this dump in SRM production system. Can you please let me know the resolution for this?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow for Purchase Order Approval
entry.content:
HI, you cannot copy from Dev to Production since some time the approver ID may differ from Testing and Production.  It has to create a manually in Production. 

Best Regards

Raj

entry.title: Combine FWSD from TM with a SD order in one invoice
entry.content:
My client, who is an LSP with operations from both TM (FWO) and SD, want to merge both services into a single invoice document.

When I create an FWO, the FWSD settlement document generates the invoice directly in SD, preventing the creation of a consolidated invoice with another document, as can be done in VF04 with multiple SD orders. 

Is there a standard mechanism that allows me to achieve this goal?

entry.title: Re: Tools for legal + management consolidation (including...
entry.content:
Hi

You might want to look at:

Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA - SAP Community

Insights into Value Chain - SAP Community

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: DMEE Configuration:Step By Step Part 1
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for detailed explanation with screen shots. I understand the concept and configuration very detailed how to create DME with attributes and source .........

 

Thanks again 🙏

entry.title: Editable column affects the values in other columns Var Pay
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on Var Pay template. We want to add an editable column in the worksheet, Column type: Money (New Column in the screenshot below), but when we insert an amount in this column, all the calculated columns change, even though New Column is not part of their formulas.

Before inserting a value in New Column

After inserting a value in New Column

We also noticed that a custom column in Business Goal changes, but none of these columns are connected with New Colunn

Before we insert value

After we insert value

Does anyone have any idea?

@xavierlegarrec , could you possibly have an understanding on why this occurs ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Cutover Management : Planning and Orchestration
entry.content:
what are the 

  • System Ramp-Down and Ramp Up activities for Finance and Commercial SAP Module?

entry.title: 🟢 Implement Observability in a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide
entry.content:
Observability helps to take data-driven informed decisions based on runtime Observability telemetry data (logs, metrics, traces, events, ...), it provides insights into SAP & customer services and systems to understand and improve efficiency, scalability, resilience, and availability.
 
When you seek for fully detailed observability data of your application, you can use SAP Cloud Logging. SAP Cloud Logging allows you to slice and dice logs, metrics, and traces in order to analyse functional and performance behavior of your BTP workload on Cloud Foundry and Kyma.
 
Speaker: Gopal Anand

entry.title: Re: Introducing ABAP Open Source Namespaces
entry.content: @eloibermejo_spirit21 Thanks for your great feedback. Sounds like something we should check and follow-up. We'll have some discussions internally to see what we can do here.

entry.title: Re: Intrastat 201 - Scenario-Specific Roles and Responsibilities
entry.content: I have another scenario.  Company A in country A does a consignment fill-up at customer B in country B.  Customer B has distribution centers in country C, D, E.  Customer B transfers consigned goods from country B to countries C, D, E.  Goods are then sold to customers from all 4 of the customer countries thus triggering a consignment issue in company A.

entry.title: 3ª Feira Laboral SAP Future Talent | Brazil
entry.content:
No dia 17 de setembro, das 15h às 16:50h (BRT), convidamos você a participar da nossa 3ª Feira Laboral SAP Future Talent, um evento especialmente voltado para alunos universitários em busca de oportunidades de emprego e desenvolvimento profissional.

O SAP Future Talent é um programa de atração de talentos voltado para a carreira em consultoria SAP e tem como objetivo apoiar nossos parceiros e clientes na identificação de novos talentos e oferecer treinamentos desenhados para iniciantes na área.

A feira contará com palestras de colaboradores e parceiros SAP, com o objetivo de fornecer aos estudantes todas as informações de uma carreira em consultoria SAP e todo seu potencial em um mundo corporativo cada vez mais orientado por IA e outras tecnologias de ponta.

E o melhor: não há custos para participar deste programa!

Não perca a oportunidade única de conhecer o programa SAP Future Talent. Inscreva-se agora para participar e descubra como você pode impulsionar sua carreira profissional.

Agenda do evento:

  • Abertura SAP
  • IA SAP
  • Melhores Práticas para Processo Seletivo
  • BREAK
  • Mentorias SAP Future Talent
  • Its Group
  • Numen
  • Claro
  • Fusion
  • Essence it
  • PWC
  • Landing Page SAP Future Talent + QR Code para JoinSAPEcosystem
  • Q&A
  • Encerramento da feira

entry.title: MDK Inline Signature Capture file size
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm curious to know if there is a way to manage the size of a signature file created with the InlineSignatureCapture control in the SAP MDK. I'm currently working on an app but the output of the signature is very large and does not fit into the pdf outputs in my client's workflow.

Is there something like "bitmapMode" available in the MDK like in Fiori mobile? See: https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/fiori-ui/android/compose/signaturecapture-inline.html

It doesn't appear that there is any option in the MDK documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/3642933ef2e1478fb1578ef2acba4ae9/Latest/en-US/reference/schemadoc/Page/FormCell/InlineSignatureCapture.schema.html

Any assistance you can provide would be great.

entry.title: 🟢 The superpower of CAP CDS: Calculated elements and annotation expressions
entry.content:
This session is a tour through CAP CDS modelling techniques, with focus on more advanced features. Some of the topics we will touch are managed associations and extensibility. The most time we will spend with two very powerful features: Calculated Elements, which help you to write clean and concise models, and Annotation Expressions, which ensure consistency of annotations across the model and simplify writing dynamic Fiori annotations.

Speaker: Steffen Weinstock
